textByHash.c02bde84590814c64f799feedfe259123d2b947b: Hey! What are you doing with those doors?
textByHash.8bf8b4bd6c404a77792c6b49e37735f5a7050f52: Well you can either go through them or leave them alone.
textByHash.e5f4e885ffa490659c65d72ef6de8c341702eee7: We are all related, brother, for we are all children of the flame.
textByHash.0437e34600a2ca898e5f72bd3ada0a0faca0cdd8: We are all related, sister, for we are all children of the flame.
textByHash.939db54a88df4a4458d32b24c81c34c1430c1f78: We are all related, my child, for we are all children of the flame.
textByHash.e9fb883b95b7a3966bd461114d4934ed54acdd94: You stand before the Doors of Dinh. Behind them lies the prison of the Wintertodt.
textByHash.d3bc3b09e6e06b3147f8ce2e97ad4aa10f179a81: We do not know what it is. All we know is that it threatens to snuff out every flame in this land and plunge the world into eternal darkness.
textByHash.21be26a4dbe81ed567f9ef79351061498624466e: That is why we are here, brother. Ever since the Wintertodt was imprisoned, members of the Order of the Sacred Flame, or Pyromancers as we're often known, have stood vigil over this place.
textByHash.9bb552558dc4b27fd43b22d7c62cf31a02496d78: That is why we are here, sister. Ever since the Wintertodt was imprisoned, members of the Order of the Sacred Flame, or Pyromancers as we're often known, have stood vigil over this place.
textByHash.81d910540b9c1a87a3c596800c1c8f1c673b36e1: That is why we are here, my child. Ever since the Wintertodt was imprisoned, members of the Order of the Sacred Flame, or Pyromancers as we're often known, have stood vigil over this place.
textByHash.5553f954ab3c3903f6f134b586c90d89af6a5d93: But alas, despite our best efforts, the Wintertodt is growing in power again.
textByHash.ec110815d047337251c98ea4fc6753ed7e40ee03: Our order searches tirelessly for a way to defeat the Wintertodt. Until we discover it, the Wintertodt must be held at bay.
textByHash.c1a1036248758dc9c3c31bd9ac12e6b1fc284d69: However, I fear your abilities are not great enough to withstand the cold of the Wintertodt. Learn the ways of the sacred flame and then return to me.
textByHash.f58e080812fa4990cbee71bcd5e727d76b0b7074: Pass through the Doors of Dinh to the prison within. You will find the finest of our order channeling the power of the sacred flame into the Wintertodt.
textByHash.5caced52defb680246ed67896bb345497c9594ac: Help them keep the holy fires lit so that they can keep the Wintertodt subdued.
textByHash.306d65a05fdda8b49b1c880722a0280fd551bf49: You will find the roots of the great Bruma tree have crept into the prison. Chop the roots and use them to keep the sacred flame alive.
textByHash.6a312681a8be1dd14bf8884c11266ff315272742: You can use the herbs of the Bruma tree to make Rejuvenation potions. Give these to any of our order who fall to the cold of the Wintertodt before they succumb to the darkness.
textByHash.0fe790494d3af5d2e7a0ca699eac9c93d6a26200: How else may I be of assistance?
textByHash.c438802805ef9cfc0bf9f57bdb9b5508a565a6d9: Do you feel the winds of winter as they lick across the land? This is the power of the Wintertodt. We know not what it is nor from where it came. Only that it wields the power of Winter itself.
textByHash.dfaaddf2e17d5c3784972793f51c88393930f1cf: The ground on which we stand was once full of light, full of life. But then the Wintertodt came. Now the fires of these lands burn no more.
textByHash.763c2437494ca1c7033e281526c8d1e99419de2c: We are the Order of the Sacred Flame, formed over a thousand years ago when the Wintertodt first threatened Great Kourend.
textByHash.a64b3914064577ac47620ac981fc7c5220a59698: We fought against the Wintertodt until we managed to lure it behind Dinh's great Doors. Our task did not end there though, for we always knew that the Wintertodt would rise again.
textByHash.4461f107d5f5abf9cb51f10511c4166fa152428f: I am Ignisia, Grand Master of the Order of the Sacred Flame. I have served our Order faithfully since I passed the Trials of Fire before the Ascent of Arceuus.
textByHash.12d0649f33d0e3d598869df84f61ab8e7cdeb89e: You are not currently strong enough to face the Wintertodt. Learn the ways of the sacred flame and then return here.
textByHash.f63aab606dc96ddbbbb44cee1e51bbe350c00509: We must hold back the Wintertodt until we can find a way to defeat it. Head into the prison and keep the holy fires lit so that our order may keep the evil at bay.
textByHash.40566bd4c46a2e7b7cfe05db50648c63643bb5bf: The Wintertodt is no longer growing in strength but it still needs to be held back. Head into the prison and keep the holy fires lit so that our order may keep the evil at bay.
textByHash.7b13c6aa2638cf4a66e61b3d75181d073ba97f0d: May the sacred flame guide you, brother.
textByHash.6fdbb42f2ab625988e7765ee71ddb9bf36dace58: May the sacred flame guide you, sister.
textByHash.f8b2c1e0e07490c2e67fdf27912ec30ca3704c7a: May the sacred flame guide you, my child.
textByHash.0957ae44d5c3d57d429ab0b77f81663528224cd2: Welcome back, brother. How may I be of assistance?
textByHash.789ffb32be00cce22cb55c5bdd8cd2dbd93bbc15: Welcome back, sister. How may I be of assistance?
textByHash.e270c9d0e1ed538fb7746959216846805498aa2d: Welcome back, my child. How may I be of assistance?
textByHash.5930bf64cc1664504999d1072414f4ae3c8a04cc: I get hayfever. Please take those flowers away.
textByHash.e49fffb800d41b0d67be6f5718d90c056e27b8f6: I would not appreciate your traps near the bank. Please take them away.
